target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Multiple balconies are collapsed or missing; large sections of facade are missing; windows are shattered or blown out; debris is visible at ground level; structural integrity appears compromised across multiple floors.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible structural collapse on upper floors; significant facade damage and missing sections; debris and exposed internal structure consistent with 45-75% area damage.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED), showing collapsed balconies, missing facade, shattered windows, and ground debris; the other with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE), exhibiting upper-floor collapse, significant facade damage, and exposed internal structure. The overall scene depicts a desolate urban area with multiple multi-story residential buildings heavily damaged, debris scattered across a snow-dusted street, and bare trees, indicating widespread destruction. The functional impact is likely complete loss of habitation and infrastructure, as both assessed buildings are structurally compromised and uninhabitable.
